across.clue: To blaze means to burn brightly or powerfully.
A banner is a long strip of cloth with a message on it.
Reality is the state of things as they actually exist.
A diary is a book in which people write their personal experiences.
Advocacy is the act of supporting or recommending something.
A perception of a situation is a way of thinking about it or understanding it.
To certify something means to confirm that its results are true.
An obstacle is an object or a problem that stops you from doing something.
Dealing with a problem early prevents it from becoming much worse later; prompt action avoids bigger trouble | a ___ in time (saves nine)
Property is something that is owned.
A gradual change or development that produces a particular result.

down.clue: If you have a lot of energy, you have plenty of strength and can do lots of things.
If something is explicit, it is very clear, open, and truthful.
The Bible is the book of sacred writing in the Christian religion.
a strong need that someone feels to regularly take an illegal or harmful drug
To postpone something is to make it happen later than planned.
To rehearse means to practice and prepare for a performance in front of people.
To encounter is to find or meet a person or thing.
Lead to a response | Cause/produce/provoke/trigger a ___ (to)
